intent: 300-credit Recraft pass for NeoWakeUP GUI finalization assets.
shared_prompt_appendix: NeoWakeUP UI finalization asset pass. Clean desktop readability, coherent with the planetary mind visuals, avoid generic SaaS styling, prefer signal cartography, layered fields, measured glow, transparent background when possible.

assets.name: control_panel_background
assets.prompt: Main control panel background for NeoWakeUP, wide desktop dashboard panel with layered atmospheric gradients, subtle linework, no text, usable as a backdrop for controls. NeoWakeUP UI finalization asset pass. Clean desktop readability, coherent with the planetary mind visuals, avoid generic SaaS styling, prefer signal cartography, layered fields, measured glow, transparent background when possible.
assets.negative_prompt: text labels, clutter, busy illustration, logo, watermark
